text: In software development, testing plays a crucial role in ensuring quality. One common approach is test-driven development, where developers write tests before the actual code. This method helps them think carefully about the desired behavior. Unit tests check small, individual parts of the code, such as a single function. In contrast, integration tests verify that different components work together properly. The main benefit of testing is confidence. When you have a comprehensive set of tests, you can make changes or add new features without worrying as much about breaking something. Testing ultimately saves time and prevents frustrating bugs.
